narrative: CEO Adam Neumann ousted ahead of failed IPO; S-1 revealed company burning 1.6 billion dollars per year with governance failures; valuation crashed from 47 billion to under 8 billion dollars
resolution: Neumann departed with 1.7 billion dollar severance; SoftBank bailout; new CEO; IPO eventually completed via SPAC at vastly reduced valuation; company later filed for bankruptcy
source: SEC S-1 filing and WSJ investigative reporting
